name: Lumpia Sauce (Paalat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, soy sauce, broth, and salt in a blender. Blend until smooth.
2. Gradually pour the blended mixture into boiling broth while stirring continuously to avoid curdling.
3. In a separate bowl, mix cornstarch with 14 cups water until dissolved.
4. Slowly stir the cornstarch-water mixture into the boiling broth, whisking constantly.
5. Continue cooking and stirring until the sauce thickens to your desired consistency.
6. Remove from heat and stir in minced garlic.
7. Serve immediately over Lumpia or use as desired.
